message:
test(ftui-extras): cover image.rs protocol detection, encoding options, and resize paths (bd-2umwv)

Add 41 new tests (21→62 total) covering: detect_protocol priority chain
(kitty>iterm2>sixel>ascii), explicit hint overrides, DetectionHints
builders/defaults, ProtocolCache lifecycle, iTerm2 encoding with
dimensions/name/aspect-ratio/inline options, kitty multi-chunk payload,
Image wrapper methods (encode_kitty/encode_iterm2/render_ascii), resize
edge cases (None/Contain/Cover/Stretch, partial constraints), scale_to_fit
zero/wide/tall inputs, ASCII ramp mapping, ImageError variants and
std::error::Error impl, derive trait coverage for all types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
